channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Accidental stimulus: the economy's tariff refund cushion
item.description: Data from the U.S. Treasury shows net customs duties. Chart by Courtenay Brown/Axios. Corporate America is receiving an unintended economic boost...

item.title: U.S. military to enforce new Iran blockade starting 4pm Tuesday
item.description: President Trump announced on Monday that the U.S. is reinstating the naval blockade on Iran and will prevent any ships from leaving or entering Iranian waters.

item.title: Why the market's biggest winners look so cheap
item.description: Data: FactSet; Note: As of June 30, 2026 market close; Table: Matt Phillips/Axios The market's giant winners this year — memory-related stocks — also appear undervalued.

item.title: Judge sanctions Trump's lawyers for IRS settlement, anti-weaponization fund
item.description: A federal judge lambasted and penalized the attorneys behind President Trump's settlement with the IRS, saying in an explosive Monday order that the case was mishandled.
